MATCH (child)-[:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
RETURN parent.idShort AS parent, child.idShort AS device, asset.globalAssetId
ORDER BY child.idShort

args.cypher:
// Find all submodels with FacilityInformation template semanticId
MATCH (sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/dfki/SubmodelTemplate/FacilityInformation/1/0'})
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm)
RETURN aas.idShort AS aas_idShort, aas.id AS aas_id, sm.idShort AS sm_idShort, sm.id AS sm_id

// Check all submodels of Hall 4 AAS
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: 'urn:aas:hall4'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN sm.idShort, sm.id, sc.id AS semanticId

// Get all elements from the HierarchicalStructures submodel of Hall 4
MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:hall4:hierarchicalstructures'})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)
RETURN el.idShort, labels(el) AS types, el.value, el.smId
ORDER BY el.idShortPath

// Get details about each device entity - their REPRESENTS_ASSET and any statements
MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:hall4:hierarchicalstructures'})-[:HAS_ELEMENT]->(entry:Entity {idShort: 'EntryNode'})
MATCH (entry)-[:HAS_ELEMENT]->(child:Entity)
MATCH (child)-[:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
OPTIONAL MATCH (child)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
OPTIONAL MATCH (child)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(prop:Property)
RETURN child.idShort AS device, asset.globalAssetId, asset.assetType, sc.id AS semanticId, 
       collect(DISTINCT prop.idShort + ': ' + COALESCE(prop.value, '')) AS properties

// Find AAS shells for each device by their globalAssetId
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(a:Asset)
WHERE a.globalAssetId IN ['urn:asset:ur3e:002', 'urn:asset:mir100:001', 'urn:asset:crx10ia:001']
OPTIONAL MATCH (aas)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/nameplate/3/0/Nameplate'})
RETURN aas.idShort, aas.id, a.globalAssetId, sm.idShort AS nameplate_sm

// Get nameplate details for all three devices
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/nameplate/3/0/Nameplate'})
WHERE aas.idShort IN ['MiR100_001', 'CRX10iA_001', 'UR3e_002']
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.idShort IN ['Manufacturer', 'ProductName', 'Model', 'SerialNumber']
RETURN aas.idShort AS device, p.idShort AS field, p.value AS value
ORDER BY device, field

// Get all properties from nameplates of the three devices
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/nameplate/3/0/Nameplate'})
WHERE aas.idShort IN ['MiR100_001', 'CRX10iA_001', 'UR3e_002']
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
RETURN aas.idShort AS device, p.idShort AS field, p.value AS value
ORDER BY device, field

// Get all elements from nameplates including collections
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/nameplate/3/0/Nameplate'})
WHERE aas.idShort IN ['MiR100_001', 'CRX10iA_001', 'UR3e_002']
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)
WHERE 'Property' IN labels(el) OR 'SubmodelElementCollection' IN labels(el)
RETURN aas.idShort AS device, el.idShort, labels(el), el.value
ORDER BY device, el.idShort

args.name: Hierarchical Structures enabling Bills of Material

args.cypher:
// Find all Entity nodes under Hall 4's HierarchicalStructures submodel that represent assets
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: $aasId})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: "HierarchicalStructures"})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(entry:Entity)
WHERE entry:Entity
OPTIONAL MATCH (entry)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(child:Entity)-[:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
OPTIONAL MATCH (child)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(childSc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN entry.idShort AS entryNode, child.idShort AS childNode, asset.globalAssetId AS globalAssetId, childSc.id AS childSemanticId

// Get AAS details for each device in Hall 4
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
WHERE asset.globalAssetId IN $assetIds
OPTIONAL MATCH (aas)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: "https://admin-shell.io/idta/nameplate/3/0/Nameplate"})
RETURN aas.idShort AS name, asset.globalAssetId AS assetId, aas.id AS aasId
ORDER BY aas.idShort

// Get nameplate info (manufacturer, product name, serial number) for each device in Hall 4
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: $aasId})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: "https://admin-shell.io/idta/nameplate/3/0/Nameplate"})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.idShort IN ["DeviceName", "Manufacturer", "SerialNumber", "ProductType", "FunctionalLocation"]
RETURN p.idShort AS property, p.value AS value

// Get all nameplate properties for all three devices
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE aas.id IN $aasIds
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: "https://admin-shell.io/idta/nameplate/3/0/Nameplate"})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
RETURN aas.idShort AS device, p.idShort AS property, p.value AS value
ORDER BY device, property

// Get all elements from Hall 4's FacilityInformation submodel
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: $aasId})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: "FacilityInformation"})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)
WHERE el:Property OR el:SubmodelElementCollection
RETURN el.idShort AS idShort, labels(el) AS types, el.value AS value

// Find all AAS shells
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)
RETURN aas.idShort, aas.id
ORDER BY aas.idShort

// List submodels of Hall4
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: $aasId})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN sm.idShort, sm.id, sc.id AS templateSemanticId

// Find assets represented by entities in Hall 4
MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: $smId})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(e:Entity)
MATCH (e)-[:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(a:Asset)
WHERE e.idShort <> 'EntryNode'
RETURN e.idShort, a.globalAssetId, a.assetKind

// Get details about the assets in Hall 4 - find their type information
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:DERIVED_FROM]->(type:AssetAdministrationShell)
WHERE aas.id IN ['urn:aas:crx10ia:001', 'urn:aas:mir100:001', 'urn:aas:ur3e:002']
RETURN aas.idShort AS instance, type.idShort AS typeShell

// Get nameplate information for each device to identify manufacturer and model
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: $aasId})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/nameplate/3/0/Nameplate'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.idShort IN ['Manufacturer', 'ManufacturerSoftwareVersion', 'SerialNumber', 'ProductIdentifier', 'DeviceType']
RETURN aas.idShort AS device, p.idShort AS property, p.value AS value

// Get all nameplate properties for CRX10iA_001
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: $aasId})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/nameplate/3/0/Nameplate'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
RETURN p.idShort AS property, p.value AS value

// Get the AAS IDs for devices in Hall 4
MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: $smId})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(e:Entity)
WHERE e.idShort <> 'EntryNode'
MATCH (e)-[:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(a:Asset)
OPTIONAL MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(a)
RETURN e.idShort AS device, a.globalAssetId, aas.id AS aasId, aas.idShort AS aasIdShort

// Get all elements from FacilityInformation submodel
MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: $smId})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)
OPTIONAL MATCH (el)-[:HAS_VALUE]->(lv:LangString)
RETURN labels(el) AS type, el.idShort AS idShort, el.value AS value, lv.language AS lang, lv.text AS text

// Check what kind of assets these are by looking at Technical Data AGV template (for AGVs)
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE aas.id IN ['urn:aas:crx10ia:001', 'urn:aas:mir100:001', 'urn:aas:ur3e:002']
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN aas.idShort AS device, sm.idShort AS submodel, sc.id AS semanticId
ORDER BY device, submodel

args.name: Hierarchical Structures enabling Bills of Material

args.cypher:
MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:hall4:hierarchicalstructures'})
      -[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(parent:Entity)
      -[:HAS_ELEMENT]->(rel:RelationshipElement {idShort: 'HasPart'})
MATCH (rel)-[:HAS_SECOND]->(second)
RETURN rel.idShortPath AS relPath, second.id AS secondId, second.idShort AS secondIdShort

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:hall4:hierarchicalstructures'})
      -[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)
RETURN el.idShort, labels(el), el.smId

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:hall4:hierarchicalstructures'})
      -[:HAS_ELEMENT]->(entry:Entity {idShort: 'EntryNode'})
      -[:HAS_ELEMENT]->(node:Entity)
OPTIONAL MATCH (node)-[:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
OPTIONAL MATCH (node)-[:HAS_ELEMENT]->(hasPart:RelationshipElement {idShort: 'HasPart'})
OPTIONAL MATCH (hasPart)-[:HAS_SECOND]->(second)
OPTIONAL MATCH (second)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(ref:ReferenceElement)
OPTIONAL MATCH (ref)-[:HAS_VALUE]->(targetAAS:AssetAdministrationShell)
RETURN node.idShort AS deviceNode, hasPart.idShort AS hasPartRel, second.idShort AS secondShort, targetAAS.idShort AS aasIdShort, targetAAS.id AS aasId

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:hall4:hierarchicalstructures'})
      -[:HAS_ELEMENT]->(entry:Entity {idShort: 'EntryNode'})
      -[:HAS_ELEMENT]->(node:Entity)
MATCH (node)-[:HAS_ELEMENT]->(child:SubmodelElement)
WHERE child.idShort = 'HasPart'
MATCH (child)-[:HAS_SECOND]->(second)
RETURN node.idShort AS device, second.id AS secondId, labels(second) AS secondLabels

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:hall4:hierarchicalstructures'})
      -[:HAS_ELEMENT]->(entry:Entity {idShort: 'EntryNode'})
      -[:HAS_ELEMENT]->(node:Entity)
MATCH (node)-[:HAS_ELEMENT]->(child:SubmodelElement)
RETURN node.idShort AS device, child.idShort AS child, labels(child) AS childLabels

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:hall4:hierarchicalstructures'})
      -[:HAS_ELEMENT]->(node:Entity)
OPTIONAL MATCH (node)-[:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(a:Asset)
OPTIONAL MATCH (node)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)
RETURN node.idShort AS device, a.globalAssetId AS assetId, el.idShort AS childElement

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:hall4:hierarchicalstructures'})
      -[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(node:Entity)
WHERE node.idShort IN ['CRX10iA_001', 'MiR100_001', 'UR3e_002']
OPTIONAL MATCH (node)-[:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(a:Asset)
OPTIONAL MATCH (node)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(rel:RelationshipElement)
OPTIONAL MATCH (rel)-[:HAS_SECOND]->(second)
RETURN node.idShort AS device, a.globalAssetId AS assetId, rel.idShort AS relType, second.id AS secondRef

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(a:Asset)
WHERE a.globalAssetId IN ['urn:asset:crx10ia:001', 'urn:asset:mir100:001', 'urn:asset:ur3e:002']
RETURN aas.idShort, aas.id, a.globalAssetId

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE aas.idShort IN ['CRX10iA_001', 'MiR100_001', 'UR3e_002']
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN aas.idShort AS device, sm.idShort AS submodel, sc.id AS templateSemanticId
ORDER BY device, submodel

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: $device})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'Nameplate'})
      -[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.idShort IN ['ModelNumber', 'Manufacturer', 'SerialNumber', 'Revision']
RETURN aas.idShort AS device, p.idShort, p.value
ORDER BY aas.idShort, p.idShort

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: $device})
      -[:DERIVED_FROM]->(typeAAS:AssetAdministrationShell)
      -[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN typeAAS.idShort AS typeShell, sm.idShort AS submodel, sc.id AS templateSemanticId

MATCH (typeAAS:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE sm.idShort = 'CapabilityDescription' AND typeAAS.idShort IN ['CRX10iA_Type', 'MiR100_Type', 'UR3e_Type']
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(cap:SubmodelElement)
WHERE cap.idShort = 'Capability'
OPTIONAL MATCH (cap)-[:HAS_VALUE]->(val:LangString)
RETURN typeAAS.idShort AS typeShell, val.text AS capabilityDesc, val.language AS lang

MATCH (typeAAS:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE sm.idShort = 'CapabilityDescription' AND typeAAS.idShort IN ['CRX10iA_Type', 'MiR100_Type', 'UR3e_Type']
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*1..2]->(el:SubmodelElement)
WHERE NOT el:SubmodelElementCollection
RETURN typeAAS.idShort AS typeShell, el.idShort, labels(el), el.value
ORDER BY typeAAS.idShort, el.idShort

MATCH (typeAAS:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE sm.idShort = 'CapabilityDescription' AND typeAAS.idShort IN ['CRX10iA_Type', 'MiR100_Type', 'UR3e_Type']
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)
RETURN typeAAS.idShort AS typeShell, el.idShort, labels(el), el.value

Found the Hierarchical Structures submodel for Hall 4. Now let me traverse it to find all devices (Entity nodes) contained in Hall 4.

args.name: FacilityInformation
Hierarchical Structures enabling Bills of Material

args.cypher:
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE sm:Submodel
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/dfki/SubmodelTemplate/FacilityInformation/1/0'})
MATCH (aas)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property {idShort: 'Area'})
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(mlp:MultiLanguageProperty {idShort: 'PrimaryUse'})
OPTIONAL MATCH (mlp)-[:HAS_VALUE]->(ls:LangString)
RETURN aas.idShort AS hallName, aas.id AS aasId, sm.id AS submodelId, p.value AS area, ls.text AS primaryUse

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: $aasId})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE sm.idShort = 'HierarchicalStructures' OR (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/HierarchicalStructures/1/1/Submodel'})
RETURN sm.idShort, sm.id

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: $smId})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*1..]->(e:Entity)
WHERE NOT (e)-[:HAS_ELEMENT]->(:Entity)
MATCH (e)-[:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(a:Asset)
OPTIONAL MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(a)
OPTIONAL MATCH (e)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(dn:Property)
WHERE dn.idShort = 'designation'
RETURN DISTINCT e.idShort AS deviceName, a.globalAssetId, aas.idShort AS assetAAS, dn.value AS designation
ORDER BY e.idShort

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: $aasId})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN sm.idShort, sc.id AS semanticId

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: $idShort})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN aas.id, sm.idShort, sm.id, sc.id AS semanticId

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: $idShort})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/nameplate/3/0/Nameplate'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.idShort IN ['Manufacturer', 'Family', 'Model', 'SerialNumber']
RETURN p.idShort, p.value

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: $idShort})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/nameplate/3/0/Nameplate'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*1..]->(smc:SubmodelElementCollection)
MATCH (smc)-[:HAS_ELEMENT]->(p:Property)
RETURN smc.idShort AS section, p.idShort, p.value

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: $smId})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*1..]->(e:Entity)
OPTIONAL MATCH (e)-[:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(a:Asset)
OPTIONAL MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(a)
OPTIONAL MATCH (e)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(prop:Property)
RETURN DISTINCT e.idShort AS entityName, e.entityType, a.globalAssetId, aas.id AS managedByAAS, collect(DISTINCT prop.idShort + ': ' + coalesce(prop.value, '')) AS properties
ORDER BY e.idShort

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: $aasId})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
OPTIONAL MATCH (aas)-[:HAS_DISPLAY_NAME]->(dn:LangString {language: 'en'})
OPTIONAL MATCH (aas)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(a:Asset)
RETURN DISTINCT sm.idShort AS submodel, sc.id AS semanticId, dn.text AS displayName, a.assetType
ORDER BY submodel

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(a:Asset)
WHERE a.globalAssetId IN [$gaid1, $gaid2, $gaid3]
MATCH (aas)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
OPTIONAL MATCH (aas)-[:HAS_DISPLAY_NAME]->(dn:LangString {language: 'en'})
RETURN aas.idShort, a.globalAssetId, sm.idShort, sc.id AS semanticId, dn.text AS displayName
ORDER BY aas.idShort, sm.idShort

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(a:Asset)
WHERE a.globalAssetId IN [$gaid1, $gaid2, $gaid3]
MATCH (aas)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/nameplate/3/0/Nameplate'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.idShort IN ['Manufacturer', 'Family', 'Model', 'SerialNumber', 'DeviceType']
RETURN aas.idShort AS device, a.globalAssetId, p.idShort, p.value
ORDER BY device, p.idShort

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(a:Asset {globalAssetId: $gaid})
      -[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/nameplate/3/0/Nameplate'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)
WHERE el:Property OR el:SubmodelElementCollection
RETURN aas.idShort, el.idShort, labels(el) AS types
ORDER BY el.idShort

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(a:Asset {globalAssetId: $gaid})
MATCH (aas)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/nameplate/3/0/Nameplate'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
RETURN p.idShort, p.value
ORDER BY p.idShort

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(a:Asset)
WHERE a.globalAssetId IN [$gaid1, $gaid2, $gaid3]
MATCH (aas)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
OPTIONAL MATCH (aas)-[:HAS_ADMIN_INFO]->(ai:AdminInfo)
RETURN aas.idShort, sm.idShort, sc.id AS semanticId, ai.templateId
ORDER BY aas.idShort, sm.idShort

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(a:Asset)
WHERE a.globalAssetId IN [$gaid1, $gaid2, $gaid3]
OPTIONAL MATCH (a)-[:HAS_SPECIFIC_ASSET_ID]->(sai:SpecificAssetId)
RETURN aas.idShort, a.globalAssetId, a.assetKind, a.assetType, sai.name, sai.value
ORDER BY aas.idShort

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE sm.idShort = 'FacilityInformation'

args.cypher:

args.name: Hierarchical Structures enabling Bills of Material

args.cypher:
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: 'urn:aas:hall4'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'HierarchicalStructures'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(entry:Entity {idShort: 'EntryNode'})
MATCH (entry)-[:HAS_ELEMENT]->(node:Entity {idShort: 'Node'})
OPTIONAL MATCH (node)-[:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
OPTIONAL MATCH (node)-[:HAS_ELEMENT]->(prop:Property)
RETURN entry.idShort, node.idShort, asset.globalAssetId AS assetId, prop.idShort AS propIdShort, prop.value AS propValue

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: 'urn:aas:hall4'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'HierarchicalStructures'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*1..5]->(el)
RETURN el.idShort, labels(el), el.smId

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: 'urn:aas:hall4'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'HierarchicalStructures'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT]->(entry:Entity {idShort: 'EntryNode'})
MATCH (entry)-[:HAS_ELEMENT]->(node:Entity)
OPTIONAL MATCH (node)-[:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
RETURN node.idShort, asset.globalAssetId

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(a:Asset)
WHERE a.globalAssetId IN ['urn:asset:ur3e:002', 'urn:asset:mir100:001', 'urn:asset:crx10ia:001']
RETURN aas.idShort, a.globalAssetId, a.assetType, a.assetKind

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(a:Asset)
WHERE a.globalAssetId IN ['urn:asset:ur3e:002', 'urn:asset:mir100:001', 'urn:asset:crx10ia:001']
MATCH (aas)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN aas.idShort, sm.idShort, sc.id AS templateSemanticId
ORDER BY aas.idShort, sm.idShort

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: $aasId})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'Nameplate'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.idShort IN ['Manufacturer', 'Model', 'SerialNumber', 'Revision']
RETURN p.idShort, p.value

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: $aasId})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'Nameplate'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.idShort IN ['Manufacturer', 'Model', 'SerialNumber', 'Revision', 'Family', 'DeviceClass', 'DeviceType']
RETURN p.idShort, p.value

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: $aasId})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'Nameplate'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.idShort IN ['Manufacturer', 'Model', 'SerialNumber', 'Revision', 'Family', 'DeviceClass', 'DeviceType']
RETURN p.idShort, p.value

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'Nameplate'})
WHERE aas.idShort IN ['MiR100_001', 'CRX10iA_001', 'UR3e_002']
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.value IS NOT NULL AND p.value <> ''
RETURN aas.idShort AS device, p.idShort, p.value
ORDER BY device, p.idShort

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'Nameplate'})
WHERE aas.idShort IN ['MiR100_001', 'CRX10iA_001', 'UR3e_002']
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*1..3]->(mlp:MultiLanguageProperty)
MATCH (mlp)-[:HAS_VALUE]->(ls:LangString)
WHERE ls.language = 'en'
RETURN aas.idShort AS device, mlp.idShort, ls.text AS value
ORDER BY device, mlp.idShort

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: 'urn:aas:hall4'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'FacilityInformation'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.value IS NOT NULL AND p.value <> ''
RETURN p.idShort, p.value

tool_calls.result_preview:
# Cypher patterns and anti-patterns

**Pre-condition.** Call `get_graph_schema()` (relationship labels) and
`get_templates_index()` (verbatim semanticIds) before composing any
Cypher. Invented labels

args.name: FacilityInformation
Hierarchical Structures enabling Bills of Material

args.cypher:
// Find all AAS with FacilityInformation submodels - these represent halls/facilities
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/dfki/SubmodelTemplate/FacilityInformation/1/0'})
RETURN aas.id, aas.idShort, sm.id AS submodelId

// Find all submodels of Hall 4
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: $aasId})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN sm.idShort, sm.id, sc.id AS templateSemanticId

// Traverse the HierarchicalStructures submodel of Hall 4 to find contained assets
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: $aasId})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/HierarchicalStructures/1/1/Submodel'})
// Find all entities in the hierarchy and their REPRESENTS_ASSET links
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(e:Entity)
OPTIONAL MATCH (e)-[:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
OPTIONAL MATCH (e)-[:HAS_SPECIFIC_ASSET_ID]->(sai:SpecificAssetId)
RETURN e.idShort AS entityIdShort, e.smId AS entitySubmodelId, asset.globalAssetId, sai.value AS specificAssetId

// Examine the structure of the HierarchicalStructures submodel of Hall 4
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: $aasId})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'HierarchicalStructures'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*1..3]->(el:SubmodelElement)
WHERE el:Entity OR el:RelationshipElement
RETURN labels(el) AS types, el.idShort, el.smId

// Find the assets represented by these entities in Hall 4's HierarchicalStructures
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: $aasId})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'HierarchicalStructures'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(e:Entity)-[:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
OPTIONAL MATCH (e)-[:HAS_DISPLAY_NAME]->(dn:LangString {language: 'en'})
RETURN e.idShort AS entityName, asset.globalAssetId, dn.text AS displayName

// Find the AAS shells that manage these assets
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(a:Asset)
WHERE a.globalAssetId IN ['urn:asset:crx10ia:001', 'urn:asset:mir100:001', 'urn:asset:ur3e:002']
OPTIONAL MATCH (aas)-[:HAS_DISPLAY_NAME]->(dn:LangString {language: 'en'})
OPTIONAL MATCH (a)-[:HAS_SPECIFIC_ASSET_ID]->(sai:SpecificAssetId)
RETURN a.globalAssetId, aas.idShort, aas.id, dn.text AS displayName, sai.value AS specificAssetId
ORDER BY a.globalAssetId

// Get asset types from nameplate or asset info for Hall 4 assets
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: $aasId})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/nameplate/3/0/Nameplate'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.idShort IN ['Manufacturer', 'Model', 'SerialNumber']
RETURN p.idShort, p.value

// Get display names and descriptions for Hall 4 assets
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(a:Asset)
WHERE a.globalAssetId IN ['urn:asset:crx10ia:001', 'urn:asset:mir100:001', 'urn:asset:ur3e:002']
OPTIONAL MATCH (aas)-[:HAS_DISPLAY_NAME]->(dn:LangString {language: 'en'})
OPTIONAL MATCH (aas)-[:HAS_DESCRIPTION]->(desc:LangString {language: 'en'})
RETURN aas.idShort, a.globalAssetId, dn.text AS displayName, desc.text AS description
ORDER BY aas.idShort

args.cypher:
MATCH (sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN DISTINCT sc.id AS semanticId
ORDER BY semanticId

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE sm.idShort = 'FacilityInformation'
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)
RETURN aas.idShort AS aasIdShort, aas.id AS aasId, el.idShort AS elementIdShort, labels(el) AS types, el.value AS value

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: 'urn:aas:hall4'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN sm.idShort, sm.id, sc.id AS templateSemanticId

args.name: Hierarchical Structures enabling Bills of Material

args.cypher:
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: 'urn:aas:hall4'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'HierarchicalStructures'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(entry:Entity)
WHERE entry.idShort = 'EntryNode'
MATCH (entry)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(node:Entity)
RETURN node.idShort AS nodeIdShort, node.entityType

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: 'urn:aas:hall4'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'HierarchicalStructures'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(node:Entity)
WHERE node.idShort IN ['CRX10iA_001', 'MiR100_001', 'UR3e_002']
OPTIONAL MATCH (node)-[:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
OPTIONAL MATCH (node)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(rel:RelationshipElement)-[:HAS_FIRST]->(first)
RETURN node.idShort AS nodeIdShort, 
       asset.globalAssetId AS globalAssetId,
       labels(first) AS firstLabels,
       first.idShort AS firstIdShort,
       first.value AS firstValue

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(a:Asset)
WHERE a.globalAssetId IN ['urn:asset:crx10ia:001', 'urn:asset:mir100:001', 'urn:asset:ur3e:002']
RETURN aas.idShort, aas.id, a.globalAssetId

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(a:Asset)
WHERE a.globalAssetId IN ['urn:asset:crx10ia:001', 'urn:asset:mir100:001', 'urn:asset:ur3e:002']
MATCH (aas)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'Nameplate'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.idShort IN ['Manufacturer', 'Model', 'SerialNumber']
RETURN aas.idShort AS asset, a.globalAssetId, p.idShort AS field, p.value AS value
ORDER BY asset, field

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: $aasIdShort})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'Nameplate'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.idShort IN ['Manufacturer', 'Model', 'SerialNumber', 'Type']
RETURN p.idShort AS field, p.value AS value
ORDER BY field

args.name: Digital nameplate

args.cypher:
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: $aasIdShort})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'Nameplate'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)
WHERE el.idShort IN ['ManufacturerName', 'ManufacturerProductDesignation', 'ManufacturerProductType', 'SerialNumber', 'YearOfConstruction']
OPTIONAL MATCH (el)-[:HAS_VALUE]->(lv:LangString)
RETURN el.idShort AS field, el.value AS propValue, lv.text AS langValue, lv.language AS lang
ORDER BY el.idShort

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'Nameplate'})
WHERE aas.idShort IN ['CRX10iA_001', 'MiR100_001', 'UR3e_002']
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)
WHERE el.idShort IN ['ManufacturerName', 'ManufacturerProductDesignation', 'ManufacturerProductType', 'SerialNumber', 'YearOfConstruction', 'CountryOfOrigin']
OPTIONAL MATCH (el)-[:HAS_VALUE]->(lv:LangString)
RETURN aas.idShort AS asset, el.idShort AS field, el.value AS propValue, lv.text AS langValue
ORDER BY asset, el.idShort

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'MiR100_001'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN sm.idShort, sm.id, sc.id AS templateSemanticId

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: $aasIdShort})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'Nameplate'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)
WHERE el.idShort IN ['ManufacturerName', 'ManufacturerProductDesignation', 'ManufacturerProductType', 'SerialNumber']
OPTIONAL MATCH (el)-[:HAS_VALUE]->(lv:LangString)
RETURN el.idShort AS field, 
       CASE WHEN labels(el) contains 'MultiLanguageProperty' THEN lv.text ELSE el.value END AS value

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'MiR100_001'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'Nameplate'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:Property)
WHERE el.value IS NOT NULL AND el.value <> ''
RETURN el.idShortPath, el.idShort, el.value

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(a:Asset)
WHERE a.globalAssetId IN ['urn:asset:crx10ia:001', 'urn:asset:mir100:001', 'urn:asset:ur3e:002']
MATCH (aas)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN DISTINCT aas.idShort AS asset, a.globalAssetId, sm.idShort AS submodel, sc.id AS templateSemanticId
ORDER BY asset, submodel

args.cypher:
// Find submodels with FacilityInformation semanticId
MATCH (sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept {id: "https://admin-shell.io/dfki/SubmodelTemplate/FacilityInformation/1/0"})
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm)
RETURN aas.id AS aasId, aas.idShort AS aasIdShort, sm.id AS smId, sm.idShort AS smIdShort

// Find all submodels of Hall 4 AAS
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: "urn:aas:hall4"})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN sm.idShort, sm.id, sc.id AS semanticId

// Traverse the HierarchicalStructures submodel of Hall 4 to find contained assets
MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: "urn:submodel:hall4:hierarchicalstructures"})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*1..]->(e:Entity)
MATCH (e)-[:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(a:Asset)
RETURN e.idShort AS entityName, e.smId AS smId, a.globalAssetId AS globalAssetId

// Find the AAS shells for each asset and their idShorts
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(a:Asset)
WHERE a.globalAssetId IN ["urn:asset:crx10ia:001", "urn:asset:mir100:001", "urn:asset:ur3e:002", "urn:asset:hall4"]
RETURN aas.idShort, a.globalAssetId, a.assetType, a.assetKind

// Show the hierarchy: which entities are children of which in Hall 4
MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: "urn:submodel:hall4:hierarchicalstructures"})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*1..]->(parent:Entity)
MATCH (parent)-[:HAS_ELEMENT]->(child:Entity)
MATCH (child)-[:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(a:Asset)
RETURN parent.idShort AS parentEntity, child.idShort AS childEntity, a.globalAssetId AS globalAssetId
ORDER BY parent.idShort, child.idShort

      -[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'HierarchicalStructures'})

      -[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/nameplate/3/0/Nameplate'})

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/dfki/SubmodelTemplate/FacilityInformation/1/0'})
OPTIONAL MATCH (aas)-[:HAS_DISPLAY_NAME]->(dn:LangString)
OPTIONAL MATCH (aas)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
RETURN aas.id, aas.idShort, dn.text AS displayName, asset.globalAssetId

// Find HierarchicalStructures submodels for Hall 4
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: 'urn:aas:hall4'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN sm.idShort, sm.id, sc.id AS semanticId

// Traverse the HierarchicalStructures submodel for Hall 4 to find contained assets
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: 'urn:aas:hall4'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:hall4:hierarchicalstructures'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*1..3]->(entry:Entity)
WHERE entry.idShort = 'EntryNode'
MATCH (entry)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*1..]->(node:Entity)
WHERE node:idShort IS NOT NULL
MATCH (node)-[:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
RETURN DISTINCT node.idShort, asset.globalAssetId

// Get all Entity nodes representing assets in Hall 4's HierarchicalStructures
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: 'urn:aas:hall4'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:hall4:hierarchicalstructures'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(node:Entity)
MATCH (node)-[:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
RETURN DISTINCT node.idShort, asset.globalAssetId

// Find AAS shells for the assets in Hall 4
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
WHERE asset.globalAssetId IN ['urn:asset:ur3e:002', 'urn:asset:mir100:001', 'urn:asset:crx10ia:001']
OPTIONAL MATCH (aas)-[:HAS_DISPLAY_NAME]->(dn:LangString)
RETURN asset.globalAssetId, aas.idShort, aas.id, dn.text AS displayName

// Find all Entity nodes and their represented assets in Hall 4's HierarchicalStructures
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: 'urn:aas:hall4'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/HierarchicalStructures/1/1/Submodel'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(e:Entity)
MATCH (e)-[:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
RETURN e.idShort, asset.globalAssetId, e.entityType

// Find the HierarchicalStructures submodel for Hall 4 - check actual semanticId in graph
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: 'urn:aas:hall4'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'HierarchicalStructures'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN sm.id, sc.id AS semanticId

// Traverse the HierarchicalStructures submodel to find all Entities with assets
MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:hall4:hierarchicalstructures'})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(e:Entity)
OPTIONAL MATCH (e)-[:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
RETURN e.idShort, e.idShortPath, asset.globalAssetId, labels(e)

// Get details about assets in Hall 4
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
WHERE asset.globalAssetId IN ['urn:asset:ur3e:002', 'urn:asset:mir100:001', 'urn:asset:crx10ia:001']
OPTIONAL MATCH (aas)-[:HAS_DISPLAY_NAME]->(dn:LangString {language: 'en'})
OPTIONAL MATCH (aas)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN asset.globalAssetId, aas.idShort, aas.id, dn.text AS displayName, collect(DISTINCT sc.id) AS templateSemanticIds

// Get nameplate details for assets in Hall 4
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
WHERE asset.globalAssetId IN ['urn:asset:ur3e:002', 'urn:asset:mir100:001', 'urn:asset:crx10ia:001']
MATCH (aas)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/nameplate/3/0/Nameplate'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.idShort IN ['Manufacturer', 'DeviceType', 'Family', 'SerialNumber']
RETURN asset.globalAssetId, aas.idShort, p.idShort, p.value
ORDER BY aas.idShort, p.idShort

args.cypher:
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)
WHERE aas.idShort CONTAINS 'Hall'
RETURN aas.idShort, aas.id

tool_calls.result_preview: {"error":"forbidden_pattern","violations":[{"rule":"idShort_contains_or_regex","hint":"Use exact match instead: WHERE aas.idShort = 'ExactName'. See cypher.md anti-pattern #4.","match":"aas.idShort CO

args.cypher:
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)
RETURN aas.idShort, aas.id

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: 'urn:aas:hall4'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE sm.idShort = 'HierarchicalStructures'
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)
RETURN el.idShort, el.smId, labels(el) AS types

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:hall4:hierarchicalstructures'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(parent:Entity)-[:HAS_ELEMENT]->(child:Entity)
MATCH (child)-[:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
RETURN parent.idShort AS parentAsset, child.idShort AS childAsset, asset.globalAssetId

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE sm.idShort = 'Nameplate' AND (aas.idShort IN ['UR3e_002', 'MiR100_001', 'CRX10iA_001'])
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.idShort IN ['ModelNumber', 'Manufacturer', 'SerialNumber']
RETURN aas.idShort AS asset, p.idShort AS property, p.value AS value
ORDER BY asset, property
